goal: Add rate-limiting middleware to the API gateway to prevent abuse from high-frequency clients.
outOfScope: Distributed rate-limit state (Redis/Memcached) — in-memory only for this phase

acceptanceCriteria.description: Rate-limit middleware rejects requests exceeding 100 req/min per IP with HTTP 429.
Gateway index imports and registers the rate-limit middleware.

assumptions.text: The API gateway uses Express.js middleware chain.
In-memory storage is acceptable for rate-limit counters in this phase.

clarificationDecisions.question: Should rate limits apply per IP or per authenticated user?
clarificationDecisions.decision: Per IP, as no authentication context is specified in the request.
clarificationDecisions.rationale: Goal says 'high-frequency clients' without mentioning user identity; IP is the available identifier.

assumptionProvenance.text: The API gateway uses Express.js middleware chain.
In-memory storage is acceptable for rate-limit counters in this phase.

readinessForPlanning.summary: No unresolved high-severity ambiguities or contradictions found; contract is ready for execution.
